name: Royal registry
function: Tracks births, suspected talent and licensed practitioners.

name: Temple claim
function: Claims magical talent as divine loan or sacred danger.

name: Guild sanction
function: Trains craft-mages, healers and engineers for money.

name: Military office
function: Conscripts siege-mages, signal-mages and counter-mages under guard.

name: Noble retainer system
function: Arranges mage marriages and keeps house mages as prestige assets.

name: City taxable profession
function: Treats mages as regulated taxable assets.

name: Hidden frontier practice
function: Hides unregistered mages to resist central control.

name: Coercive mage policy
function: Sterilizes, exiles, enslaves or tattoos mages out of fear.
